## Entities.Fillings.Converters.procedureEntities variable

Converter for filling recipe procedures with preferred selection. Validates that preferredId (if specified) exists in options.

**Signature:**

```typescript
procedureEntities: Converter<Model.IOptionsWithPreferred<IProcedureRefEntity, ProcedureId>>
```
